mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material (user_id, topic_id, material_type, status, title, description, raw_content, source_url, file_key, comment, score, invalid_reason, inbox_at, inbox_read_at, collected_at, collected_read_at, archived_at, invalid_at, last_retrieved_at, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, #{materialType}, #{status}, #{title}, #{description}, #{rawContent}, #{sourceUrl}, #{fileKey}, #{comment}, #{score}, #{invalidReason}, #{inboxAt}, #{inboxReadAt}, #{collectedAt}, #{collectedReadAt}, #{archivedAt}, #{invalidAt}, #{lastRetrievedAt}, #{isDeleted}, #{deletedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT m.*
ORDER BY
COALESCE(m.score, 0)
ASC DESC
COALESCE( CASE m.status WHEN 'INBOX' THEN m.inbox_at WHEN 'PENDING_REVIEW' THEN m.updated_at WHEN 'COLLECTED' THEN m.collected_at WHEN 'ARCHIVED' THEN m.archived_at WHEN 'INVALID' THEN m.invalid_at ELSE m.updated_at END, m.updated_at, m.created_at )
ASC DESC
m.updated_at
ASC DESC
CASE m.status WHEN 'INBOX' THEN 1 WHEN 'PENDING_REVIEW' THEN 2 WHEN 'COLLECTED' THEN 3 WHEN 'ARCHIVED' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END,
m.status m.created_at
ASC DESC
, m.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT m.material_type AS name, COUNT(1) AS count FROM material m WHERE m.topic_id = #{topicId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY m.material_type
SELECT AVG(score) FROM material WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND score IS NOT NULL
